search_query: who became university at albany president 2013
combined_text: SUNY Board Appoints Dr. Robert J. Jones as University at Albany President "SUNY Board Appoints Dr. Robert J. Jones as University at Albany President Dr. Robert J. Jones, senior vice president for Academic Administration at the University of Minnesota System, will become the 19th president of the University at Albany, effective January 2, 2013. NEW YORK (September 12, 2012
